QueryPanel

One-line:
QueryPanel is an embedded analytics platform for B2B SaaS that turns natural language prompts into tenant-safe SQL, charts, and customer-facing dashboards.

Website:
https://querypanel.io/

Primary product pages:
- https://querypanel.io/
- https://querypanel.io/demo
- https://querypanel.io/compare
- https://querypanel.io/blog
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/@querypanel/node-sdk

Who it is for:
- B2B SaaS teams building customer-facing analytics
- Engineering teams that need multi-tenant isolation
- Product teams that want to ship embedded dashboards quickly

Core capabilities:
- Natural language to SQL
- Multi-tenant query scoping
- Embedded analytics UI for customer apps
- Headless Node SDK for backend integration
- Support for PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, BigQuery, and MySQL

Security model:
- Customer data stays in customer infrastructure
- SQL is executed in customer environment
- Designed for tenant-aware access controls

Canonical brand terms:
- QueryPanel
- QueryPanel SDK
- @querypanel/node-sdk

Contact:
- https://querypanel.io/
- https://github.com/querypanel/node-sdk
